## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.6

### 📷 Camera Motion
- Maps additional APK-style camera motion event payloads to the regular Home Assistant Motion binary sensor.
- Handles motion events reported by numeric event type, motion event names, nested event items, and top-level camera event payloads.
- Treats camera AI detections as regular motion as well, so the Motion binary sensor reflects camera activity when AI events are received.

### 🧭 HACS Release Metadata
- Keeps the GitHub release tag and Home Assistant manifest version aligned as `vX.Y.Z` and `X.Y.Z`.
- Adds explicit HACS metadata for the integration name, minimum Home Assistant version, and minimum HACS version.
- Stops using the root README as HACS-rendered repository content.

### 🧪 Release Validation
- Adds official HACS validation for repository metadata.
- Adds hassfest validation for the custom integration.
- Tightens release checks so future stable releases use the expected `vX.Y.Z` tag and matching manifest version.
